# 🚀 Pull Request

## 📝 Description

Briefly describe your changes:
- What feature, fix, or refactor did you implement for Andypolis? (e.g., New building logic, Map parser fix, etc.)
- How does this improve the game strategy or the C++ code structure?

### 📸 Media (Optional)
*If you added new CLI visuals, map icons, or terminal effects, please attach a screenshot or GIF here.*

---

## 🏗️ Type of Change
Please check the option that is relevant:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds gameplay functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactor (improving TDA/OOP structure without changing behavior)
- [ ] 🛠️ Build system update (Makefile / Compilation)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code compiles successfully using `make` or `make main`.
- [ ] I have run the game with `make valgrind` and it reports **0 memory leaks**.
- [ ] I have verified that the game still reads correctly from the `archivos_de_texto/` folder.
- [ ] I have followed the project's C++ guidelines (Encapsulation, Const-correctness).
- [ ] I have tested the turn-based logic and resource collection.

---

Thanks for your contribution to **Andypolis**! 🏗️
